titleStmt.title: SII 22.66: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 66. (A.R. No. 66 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, KALLAKKURICHCHI TALUK, TIRUVARAṄGAM. RAṄGANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE RIGHT AND LEFT WALLS OF THE ENTRANCE. SADĀŚIVADĒVA—ŚAKA 1480 (A.D. 1557)

summary.p: The details of date are given as Piṅgaḷa, Kaṉṉi, śu. 2, Rēvati, Friday, which yield the equivalent A.D. 1557, September 10. But the tithi was ba. 2. The record states that on this day Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Obaladēva-Mahārāja, son of Kōnēṭayya-Mahārāja and grandson of Rāmarāja Koṇḍudēva-Mahārāja of the Ātrēya-gōtra, Yajuś-śākhā and Āpastamba-sūtra who had the Nāyakattanam of Magadaimaṇḍalam conferred on him by the king, granted the income from three villages Eḍuttavanallūr, Māḍāmpūṇḍi and Periya-Pavaṇḍai in Muḍiyaṉūr-paṟṟu for the several requirements of daily worship and offerings, and for special festival occasions to god Raṅganātha at Uttara-Tiruvaraṅgam in the same paṟṟu (division). On the representation of one Tirumalainambi Śrīrāmayyaṅgār to the chief, that the grant did not cover the full expenses incurred in the temple, the latter is said to have made an additional gift of the income from Pāḍiyēndal. Muḍiyaṉūr-paṟṟu is stated to be situated in Vaḻudilampaṭṭu-chāvaḍi in Koṟukkai-kūṟṟam, a su-bdivision of Meyguṉṟa-vaḷanāḍu in Magadaimaṇḍalam. It is also stated that it was situated in Tiruvadi-rājyam in Magadaimaṇḍalam. Hence it seems likely that Tiruvadi-rājyam was a major division, the same as Meyguṉṟa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīmate rāmānujāya namaḥ śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran me
tinimiśvarakhaṇḍa khaṭṭār sāḷuva hariyarāya vibhāṭan pāṣaikkuttappuvarā
yara(mu)kaṇṭa muvvarāyarakaṇṭa kaṇṭa nāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu kuṭātāṉ
tulukka taḷavipāṭaṉ tulukkamokāran tavittāṉ Emmaṇṭalamum yiḻamum ti
ṟai koṇṭaruḷiya Irācātirāca rāca parameśvara pūṟuva dakṣiṇa pa[ ścima Uttara] Icca
tu samudrādipati gajaveṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya śrīvīrapratāpa kṛṣṇadevama hārāya
Acyutadevamahā[rāya*] catāśivadevamahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā
niṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 8 10- Itiṉmel cellāniṉṟa piṅkaḷa samvatsarattu
k kaṉṉi nāyiṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu dvitiyaiyum revatinakṣatramum peṟṟa cukkiravāra
ttu nāḷ meykuṉṟa vaḷanāṭṭuk koṟukkaik kūṟṟattu vaḻutilam paṭṭu cāvaṭi
makatai maṇḍalam tiruvatirācciyattup peṇṇaikkut teṉkarai muṭiya ṉūṟpaṟ
ṟu Uttaratiruvaraṅkam śrī Iṟaṅkanātaṟku Ātreyakotrattu Āpastamba sūtrat
tu Ejussuśśāka Addhyāpakarāṉa śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara rāmarāja koṇṭu rājade
vamahārājāviṉ pautrarāna koneṭṭayyadevamahārājāviṉ putran Opaḷa devamahā
rājāveṉ śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi svāmi śatāśivadevamahārāyar nammuṭa nāya
kkattaṉattukkup pālittaruḷiya makatai maṇṭalattu meykuṉṟavaḷanāṭṭu koṟukkaik kū
ṟṟattu vaḻutilampaṭṭuc cāvaṭi muṭiyaṉūṟpaṟṟil Eṭuttavaliya nallūr māṭāmpūṇṭi
periyapavaṇṭai Ākak kiṟāma muṉṟum Uttara tiruvaraṅkam śrīraṅkanātaṟku sama
rpittom Ātreyakotrattu Ejussuśśāka Addhyāpakarāna śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara
rāmarāja koṇṭurājadevamahārājāviṉ pautrarāna koneṭṭayya mahārājāviṉ
putran Opaḷadevamahārājāven Inta Uttara tiruvaraṅkam śrīraṅkanātaṟku Eṭuttavanallūr
grā mam Oṉṟukku poṉThe combined form of these two represents the symbol for poṉ.ḷa pa māṭāmpūṇṭi poṉ 2 100 2 10 6periyapavuṇṭai poṉ 100 2pa Āka kiṟāmam muṉṟukku
paṭittaram viṭṭa poṉ 4 100 4 10 6 ṇā kiṟāmavaḻiyil kaṇṭa Eṭuttavanallūr poṉ 100 māṭāmpūṇṭi poṉ 100 10
periyapavuṇṭai poṉ 100 2pa Āka kiṟāmam muṉṟukku kaṇṭa poṉ 3 100 10 Itukku cilavu nāḷoṉṟukku taḷi
kaikku Ammutupaṭikkuṅ tiruvotta cāmattukku Ammutupaṭi 6 10 2 Atirasa
paṭi Oṉṟukku Ammutupaṭi �va3 10 3 tocaikku Ammutupaṭi ṅa� Iṭṭalikku Ammutupaṭi 6 10 2
Āka Ammutupaṭi �ṅa2ṇāpu1ṟā1va payaṟu �ṇāpapa vaṭaippaṭikku Uḷuntu yava tocaippaṭikku
Uḷuntu 9 10 2 Iṭṭalippaṭi Oṉṟukku Uḷuntu ṅa� Āka Uḷuntu taṇāṅaṉāyā9 Atirasattukku vellam
palam 100 śrī pantam taḷikaikku ney 1�pa tiruvottacāmattukku ney 2 tocaikku ney lu Āka ney
yataṇāvanava tiruvottacāmattukku cakkarai palam 2pa4 10 2pa Atirasattukku Eḷḷeṇṇai 3 va
ṭaikku Eḷḷeṇṇai 7 10 2 tocaikku Eḷḷeṇṇai � Āka Eṇṇai ṅa100 2�ṇā pu2 10 2
taḷikai 5- kku paḻam 5 tiruvottacāmattukku paḻam 4 Āka paḻam 9 Ipu1�pa tocai I
ṭṭalikku Elam palam 2�ṇāpa� kaṟi Amutukku � Uppu nāḻikku paṟupu taḷiyaikku miḷa
ku palam va Atirasattukku miḷaku palam 1� vaṭaikku miḷaku palam 1 Āka miḷaku palam
2 ntaṇāpu2pa1ma Atirasattukku cirakam ṟupa Iṭṭali tocaikku cirakam n=ta Āka cirakam n=tai
Erikarumpukku puipa� tiruvottacāmattukku pāl yaṅaipuva�pa tayirukku 1�
cantaṇam palam 4kku In=tapu� Aṭaikkāy Amutu Upaṇā� Ilai Amutu Upaṇāpu�
Āka nāḷoṉṟukku 8va� Āka mātam Oṉṟukku poṉ Upaipu1va varuṣam Oṉṟu
kku nāḷ 3 100 6 10 5- kku 3 100 5pa6nta� māta tirunakṣattiṟam tirunakṣatram Oṉṟukku
puṇā Āka mātam Oṉṟukku tirunakṣattiṟam 10 7 pu Aṉā Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku �pu2�
Āṭṭait tirunakṣattiṟam Oṉṟukku pu8 Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku tirunakṣat tiṟam 10 7- kku
10 3pucā svayampākiyaḷ Ilakkaikku Atirasam vaṭaiy tocai Iṭṭali ca
maikkiṟattukkum taḷikai 5- kkum tirunakṣatram camaikkiṟattukku janam muṉṟu
kku janam Oṉṟukku 3pa cātam muṉṉāḻikku mātamoṉṟukku mapuka Āka 4 Āka janam
muṉṟukku 1pa2 Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku Opaḷarācāviṉ Upaiyam mā
cittirunāḷukku poṉ ṅa1 tirunāḷ Iraṇṭukku tiruttoppu maṇṭapa ciṟappu
Upaiyat tirumālaikku mātamoṉṟukku pu3im picātam 3 10 2ipa1 Āka pa4i Āka varuṣam
Oṉṟukku 5pu4 cantaṉakkāppu Ūḻiyattukku mātam Oṉṟukku pu3 picātam 4 10 2ṇāpu1i Āka
pu4i Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukku 5 10 4 Opaḷarācā tiruttoppu Āḷ Āṟukku mātam Oṉṟukku
varuṣam Oṉṟukku poṉ 3 Āka varuṣam Oṉṟukkuc cilavu poṉ 4 100 4 10 5pucānta� Itil U
ḷnaṭṭam poṉ 100 10 5cān=tapaṟu Āka piramātica varuṣamutal nāḷ varum Āṉi mātam varaikku varuṣam 4 ṇā Uḷnaṭṭam
poṉ 3 100 10 Inta poṉ Uḷnaṭṭamāy Irikkaiyil paṭittaram Uḷḷatu Utta Uttāramāka viṭṭavaṉ
viḻukkāṭu paṟṟi varukaiyil tirumalainampi cirirāmayyiṅkār koneṭṭi Opaḷadevamahārājāvukku Aṟi
kkai paṇṇukaiyil rājā Inta Uḷnaṭṭa vaṟtamānam keṭṭu bhagavat som Ākāteṉṟu Uḷnaṭṭāna
viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu krayamākak kaṭṭi muṉneḻutiṉatil veṭṭu marutuṭaiccu Uttara tiruvaraṅkam raṅka
nātaṟku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu samarppittu piṅkaḷa varuṣa mutalāka paṭittara Uḷnaṭṭattup pāṭiyentalum samarppitteṉ
Ātreyagotrattu Āpastambasūtrattu Ejussuśākha Addhyāpakarāna śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara rāmarāja koṇṭu rāja
nadevamahārājāviṉ pautrarāna koneṭṭidevamahārājāviṉ putran Opaḷadevamahārājar Eṭuttavaliyanal
lūr māṭāmpūṇṭi periyapavaṇṭai tiruttoppu pāṭiyental Itel lām Uttara tiruvaraṅkam raṅkanātaṟku sama
rppitteṉ Intappaṭikku koneṭṭi Opaḷatevamahārājāviṉ Uttarap paṭikku tirumalainampi cirāmayyaṅkār
paṇṇivicca cilāśāsanam Imna śilāśāsanappaṭiye Uttara tiruvaraṅkam raṅkanātaṟku Ācantrātstāhi Ā
ka naṭattakkaṭavarkaḷākavum dānapālanayormadhye dānāt śreyonu pālanam dānāt svargamavāpnoti pā
lanādaccutam padam . 2 svadattāddviguṇam puṇyam paradattānupālanam para dattāpa hāreṇa svadattanniṣphalam bhavet
svadattām paradattām vā yo hareta vasundharām ṣaṣṭirparṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāñjāyate kṛmiḥ . Ekaikā bhagini
loke sarveṣāmapi bhūbhujām na bhogyā na karagrāhyā vipradattā vasundharā
Digital edition of SII 22.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
